name: Easy Chicken Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix the vegetables, chicken, and soup in an ungreased 9-inch pie plate.
3. Stir the remaining ingredients with a fork until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
